title: Whispering Earring
description: Gain 1 energy icon at the start of each turn. [red]Vakuu plays your first turn for you.[/red]
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: On the first turn of combat, automatically selects and plays cards from your hand (up to 13). Shows an approval message if fewer than 13 cards were played, or a warning if all 13 cards were exhausted. Increases maximum energy by 1.
